Tangled (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $200,821,936Details
International Box Office $381,118,145
Worldwide Box Office $581,940,081
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $171,201,939
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $65,663,692
Total $236,865,631
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Fugitive bandit, Flynn Ryder, hides out in a mysterious tower and is taken hostage by Rapunzel. Locked in the tower with 70 feet of hair, Rapunzel strikes a deal with Flynn to gain her freedom. The pair set out on an adventure with the King's guards in hot pursuit.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$48,767,052 (24.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$260,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,603 opening theaters/3,603 max. theaters, 9.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $304,112,182

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2010 (Wide) by Walt Disney
February 2nd, 2011 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 2nd, 2010 (Wide) (Lebanon)
December 9th, 2010 (Wide) (Germany)
February 10th, 2011 (Wide) (South Korea)
November 5th, 2020 (Wide) (Australia)
January 6th, 2022 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: March 29th, 2011 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for brief mild violence
(Rating bulletin 2142, 10/13/2010)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Development Hell, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR

Subgenre: Musical-Adventure
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Animation Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Fugitive bandit, Flynn Ryder, hides out in a mysterious tower and is taken hostage by Rapunzel. Locked in the tower with 70 feet of hair, Rapunzel strikes a deal with Flynn to gain her freedom. The pair set out on an adventure with the King's guards in hot pursuit.
